rulings.Case Title: MCCORMACK BARON RAGAN MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC VS. KIMBERLY SWAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery; To Continue Settlement Conference And Trial; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf Mcormack Baron Ragan Management Services And Its Attorneys Of Record
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 3 , 2012. Line 9 - DEFENDANT KIMBERLY SWAN's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery; To Continue Settlement Conference And Trial; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Mcormack Baron Ragan Management Services And Its Attorneys Of Record. Defendant's Motion to Compel Discovery is continued to August 8, 2012 for moving party to file a reply addressing Plaintiff's opposition and narrowing its requests to remaining issues no later than August 7, 2012 noon. Trial is continued to August 13, 2012, settlement conference is continued to August 9, 2012. =(501/KT)

rulings.Case Title: JIANWEN JIN VS. MICHAEL DELACRUZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 3 , 2012. Line 1 - DEFENDANT MICHAEL DELACRUZ and PAUL DELACRUZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendants' Demurrer to Complaint is sustained with leave to amend for P to allege whether D was a licensee "at all relevant times;" after November 7, 2011; prior to May 30, 2012.=(501/KT)
